> Official Temporal multi-SDK skill for long-running durable execution. Complements local `event-driven-architect` with implementation depth.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add temporalio/skill-temporal-developer --skill temporal-developer -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/temporal-developer`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/temporal-developer.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add temporalio/skill-temporal-developer --skill temporal-developer -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Official Temporal multi-SDK skill for long-running durable execution. Complements local `event-driven-architect` with implementation depth.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Official Temporal multi-SDK skill for building durable, long-running workflows and activities with Temporal. Complements local event-driven-architect skill. Evidence gathered from upstream SKILL.md, READMEs, and repo structure via web research.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add temporalio/skill-temporal-developer --skill temporal-developer -y -g -a antigravity, claude-code, codex, crush, cursor, gemini-cli, github-copilot, grok, opencode` status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[temporalio/skill-temporal-developer](https://github.com/temporalio/skill-temporal-developer)

## Comparable Alternatives

A general-purpose agent instruction without a scoped skill contract

&gt; Web research of upstream repo (SKILL.md/contents); evidence only, not authority. Use external-skill-auditor for live verification before install or promotion. Not an endorsement.
